Disclaimer.text: This is an AI clinical decision-support tool for licensed medical professionals. It does not provide a diagnosis. The treating doctor is fully responsible for the final clinical decisions.

Admin.title: Admin · Usage monitor
Admin.sub: Per-doctor activity and LLM token consumption.

tier.title: Plan tier
tier.hint: Tier determines per-minute, per-day, and per-week token caps.

Admin.emptyCases: No cases yet for this doctor.

chart.noData: No LLM activity in this window.

kpi.costPartial: Partial — some models have no pricing

AdminSettings.title: LLM settings
AdminSettings.sub: Choose which model the agents use. Selection is stored in the database and overrides the .env value.
AdminSettings.providerHint: The active provider is fixed by LLM_PROVIDER in .env. You can preview / preset model choices for the other providers from here, but they only take effect once LLM_PROVIDER points at them.
AdminSettings.modelPickerSub: The selected model is used for chat replies, report generation, and web-search prompts.
AdminSettings.sourceApi: {n} models from live API (filtered to AI Studio free tier)
AdminSettings.sourceFallback: {n} models from curated fallback (API unreachable or no key)
AdminSettings.resetConfirm: Clear the DB override and fall back to LLM_PROVIDER's .env / default model?
AdminSettings.note: Approximate cost is calculated using the published per-million-token rates. Model availability and pricing may change.

flash.savedUnknown: Saved. The model isn't in the known catalog — make sure the ID is exactly right.
flash.reset: Override cleared. Falling back to .env / default.

Landing.headline: A clinical decision-support tool, not a diagnosis machine.
Landing.sub: Select a specialist AI agent, attach the case, and receive a structured differential, evidence summary, and follow-up questions. Every output ends with the same reminder: the licensed doctor makes the final call.
Landing.feat1Body: Cardiology, Neurology, Oncology, Emergency, OB/GYN, and more — each with its own checklist and red-flag screening.
Landing.feat2Body: Upload PDFs, DOCX referrals, lab reports and discharge summaries. Extracted text becomes part of the case.
Landing.feat3Body: Differentials with likelihood, evidence for and against, missing-info flags, and uncertainty levels — never invented citations.

Login.title: Sign in
Login.blurb: Doctor-only tool. By signing in you confirm you are a licensed medical professional.

Register.title: Create your account
Register.blurb: For licensed medical professionals. Your login is required to use specialist agents and to save cases.

Dashboard.title: Cases
Dashboard.emptyBody: Create your first case to start working with a specialist agent.

Agents.title: Specialist agents
Agents.sub: Browse the specialist personas. Each agent has its own required-context checklist, red-flag screening, and validated decision-rule library built in.
Agents.searchPlaceholder: Search by specialty, symptom, scoring tool…
Agents.startCase: Start a case with this agent

NewCase.title: New case
NewCase.sub: Give the case a short title, then choose a specialist agent.
NewCase.placeholder: e.g. 58yo male, chest pain 2h, prior CAD
NewCase.avoidIdentifiers: Avoid storing direct patient identifiers (name, DOB, address) in the title. Use a brief de-identified descriptor.

Case.adminReadOnly: Admin view — this case belongs to another doctor. Read-only.
Case.sparseData: Patient data is sparse ({percent}% of common fields filled). The agent will likely ask follow-up questions before producing a confident differential.

patient.symptomsPh: Onset, character, severity, triggers, associated symptoms…
patient.vitalsPh: BP, HR, RR, SpO2, temperature, GCS…
patient.question: Clinical question for the agent
patient.questionPh: What do you want this specialist to weigh in on?

documents.uploadHint: PDF, DOCX, images, or text. Max 15 MB each.
documents.tip: Tip: avoid uploading documents containing direct identifiers (full names, addresses). The agent only needs the clinical content.
documents.noText: (No text extracted. The doctor may paste content using the edit button.)

chat.empty: Ask the agent a clinical question to start.
chat.placeholder: Ask a follow-up or paste extra context…

report.noBody: Add patient data and supporting documents, then generate a structured decision-support report.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.name: Name
Settings.notConfigured: {provider} selected but API key not configured — running in demo mode
Settings.disabledNote: Disabled — research module returns labeled placeholders
Settings.envHint: Configure in .env: set LLM_PROVIDER to openai, anthropic, or gemini, then provide the matching key (OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, or GEMINI_API_KEY) and optional model override (OPENAI_MODEL, ANTHROPIC_MODEL, GEMINI_MODEL). Toggle ENABLE_WEB_SEARCH to enable provider-native web search.
Settings.usageEmpty: No LLM activity recorded in the last 30 days.

limit.none: No rate limits set — your account has unlimited LLM usage.

Report.demoBanner: Demo mode: no LLM provider API key is configured, so no real clinical analysis was performed.
Report.followUpTitle: Follow-up questions before a confident analysis

Limit.exceeded: {window} LLM token limit reached ({used} / {limit}). Wait or ask your administrator to raise the limit.

Print.hint: Use your browser's print dialog to save as PDF.
Print.noReportBody: Generate a report from the case page first.
Print.footer: This document was generated by an AI clinical decision-support tool. It is not a diagnosis. The licensed treating doctor remains fully responsible for the final clinical decisions and treatment plan.
